[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A ginger and white cat with a collar sits on a dark surface next to a blue-lidded cup and another orange cat paw reaching into the frame.

Main Subject:
A single orange-and-white cat is centered, sitting upright with its front paws on a dark surface and facing slightly left. It has a white chest and muzzle, orange ears and head, and a collar with a small round tag.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors, with stacked containers and a blue door or panel in the background. Lighting is even and indoor-like, with the cat close to the camera.

Visual Details:
The main cat’s body is mostly white on the front with orange patches on the head and shoulders, and orange fur on the front legs. A blue-lidded cup with a translucent reddish-brown liquid sits in front of the cat near the bottom left/center. The cup has a blue lid and a dark orange-brown body; a handle is visible on the side facing the camera. Behind the cat, there are metal and plastic shelving-like elements, including a dark grid or framework and a red strip with evenly spaced holes. On the right edge, a second orange cat’s paw and partial body are visible reaching toward the surface. The camera angle is close and slightly above, creating a tight composition focused on the cat and the cup.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a seated orange-and-white cat wearing a collar beside a blue-lidded cup filled with a reddish liquid. Another orange cat’s paw is visible at the right edge, reaching toward the same surface.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
